about.title: About PM Real Estate
about.subtitle: Vientiane's trusted property agency
about.introP1: PM Real Estate has been connecting buyers, sellers, and tenants with the right properties in Vientiane since 2015. We specialise in residential sales, commercial land, and long-term rentals across all major districts of the Lao capital.
about.introP2: Our bilingual team — fluent in Lao, English, and Mandarin — guides international clients and local families through every step of the property journey, from first viewing to title deed transfer.
about.why1Desc: Deep knowledge of every Vientiane neighbourhood, pricing trends, and land title regulations.
about.why2Desc: Clear fees, honest valuations, and no hidden costs. We work for you, not the commission.
about.why3Desc: Fluent support in Lao, English, and Mandarin throughout the entire process.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question or want to arrange a viewing? Reach out and our team will be in touch within one business day.
